en: After these things God tested Abraham and said to him, "Abraham!" And he said, "Here am I."
zh: 這些事以後， 神試驗亞伯拉罕，對他說：“亞伯拉罕啊！”他回答：“我在這裡。”

en: He said, "Take your son, your only son Isaac, whom you love, and go to the land of Moriah, and offer him there as a burnt offering on one of the mountains of which I shall tell you."
zh: 神說：“帶著你的兒子，就是你所愛的獨生子以撒，到摩利亞地去，在我所要指示你的一座山上，把他獻為燔祭。”

en: So Abraham rose early in the morning, saddled his donkey, and took two of his young men with him, and his son Isaac. And he cut the wood for the burnt offering and arose and went to the place of which God had told him.
zh: 亞伯拉罕清早起來，預備好了驢，帶著兩個童僕和自己的兒子以撒，也劈好了獻燔祭用的柴，就起程到 神指示他的地方去。

en: On the third day Abraham lifted up his eyes and saw the place from afar.
zh: 第三日，亞伯拉罕舉目觀望，遠遠地看見了那地方。

en: Then Abraham said to his young men, "Stay here with the donkey; I and the boy will go over there and worship and come again to you."
zh: 亞伯拉罕對他的童僕說：“你們和驢留在這裡，我與孩子要到那邊去敬拜，然後回到你們這裡來。”

en: And Abraham took the wood of the burnt offering and laid it on Isaac his son. And he took in his hand the fire and the knife. So they went both of them together.
zh: 亞伯拉罕把獻燔祭的柴，放在他兒子以撒的身上，自己手裡拿著火與刀。他們二人一起向前走的時候，

en: And Isaac said to his father Abraham, "My father!" And he said, "Here am I, my son." He said, "Behold, the fire and the wood, but where is the lamb for a burnt offering?"
zh: 以撒問他父親亞伯拉罕說：“爸爸！”亞伯拉罕回答：“我兒！有甚麼事？”以撒說：“你看，火與柴都有了，可是獻燔祭用的羊羔在哪裡呢？”

en: Abraham said, "God will provide for himself the lamb for a burnt offering, my son." So they went both of them together.
zh: 亞伯拉罕回答：“我兒， 神自己必親自預備獻燔祭用的羊羔。”於是二人繼續一起前行。

en: When they came to the place of which God had told him, Abraham built the altar there and laid the wood in order and bound Isaac his son and laid him on the altar, on top of the wood.
zh: 他們到了 神指示他的地方，亞伯拉罕就在那裡築了一座祭壇，擺好了柴，捆綁了自己的兒子以撒，就把他放在祭壇的柴上。

en: Then Abraham reached out his hand and took the knife to slaughter his son.
zh: 亞伯拉罕伸手拿刀，要宰殺自己的兒子的時候，

en: But the angel of the LORD called to him from heaven and said, "Abraham, Abraham!" And he said, "Here am I."
zh: 耶和華的使者從天上呼叫亞伯拉罕，說：“亞伯拉罕，亞伯拉罕！”亞伯拉罕回答：“我在這裡。”

en: He said, "Do not lay your hand on the boy or do anything to him, for now I know that you fear God, seeing you have not withheld your son, your only son, from me."
zh: 天使說：“不可在這孩子身上下手，一點也不可害他；現在我知道你是敬畏 神的了，因為你沒有留下你的兒子、你的獨生子不給我。”

en: And Abraham lifted up his eyes and looked, and behold, behind him was a ram, caught in a thicket by his horns. And Abraham went and took the ram and offered it up as a burnt offering instead of his son.
zh: 亞伯拉罕舉目觀望，看見在後面有一隻公綿羊，兩角扣在稠密的小樹叢中；亞伯拉罕就去取了那隻公綿羊，把牠獻為燔祭，代替自己的兒子。

en: So Abraham called the name of that place, "The LORD will provide"; as it is said to this day, "On the mount of the LORD it shall be provided."
zh: 亞伯拉罕給那地方起名叫“耶和華以勒”。直到今日，人還說：“在耶和華的山上必有預備。”

en: And the angel of the LORD called to Abraham a second time from heaven
zh: 耶和華的使者第二次從天上呼叫亞伯拉罕，

en: and said, "By myself I have sworn, declares the LORD, because you have done this and have not withheld your son, your only son,
zh: 說：“耶和華說：‘我指著自己起誓，你既然作了這事，沒有留下你的兒子、你的獨生子，

en: I will surely bless you, and I will surely multiply your offspring as the stars of heaven and as the sand that is on the seashore. And your offspring shall possess the gate of his enemies,
zh: 我必定賜福給你，必使你的後裔繁多，像天上的星，海邊的沙；你的後裔必佔領仇敵的城門。

en: and in your offspring shall all the nations of the earth be blessed, because you have obeyed my voice."
zh: 地上萬國都要因你的後裔得福，因為你聽從了我的話。’”

en: So Abraham returned to his young men, and they arose and went together to Beersheba. And Abraham lived at Beersheba.
zh: 亞伯拉罕回到他的童僕那裡；他們就起程，一起到別是巴去了；亞伯拉罕就住在別是巴。

en: Now after these things it was told to Abraham, "Behold, Milcah also has borne children to your brother Nahor:
zh: 這些事以後，有人告訴亞伯拉罕說：“密迦也給你的兄弟拿鶴生了幾個兒子；

en: Uz his firstborn, Buz his brother, Kemuel the father of Aram,
zh: 長子是烏斯，他的弟弟是布斯，和亞蘭的父親基母利；

en: Chesed, Hazo, Pildash, Jidlaph, and Bethuel."
zh: 還有基薛、哈瑣、必達、益拉和彼土利。

en: (Bethuel fathered Rebekah.) These eight Milcah bore to Nahor, Abraham's brother.
zh: ”這八個人，都是密迦給亞伯拉罕的兄弟拿鶴生的兒子。

en: Moreover, his concubine, whose name was Reumah, bore Tebah, Gaham, Tahash, and Maacah.
zh: 拿鶴的妾名叫流瑪。她也生了提八、迦含、他轄和瑪迦。
